changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Update Sample Reception & Registration page content with detailed JSON structure

column.name: content

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Reception & Registration - Batch verification and metadata capture of incoming samples

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1
